label: scam
text: Your vehicle has an unpaid traffic challan and a court case will be filed today. Pay the penalty immediately through the link we sent, or your driving license and RC will be cancelled.

label: scam
text: Aapke bijli bill me extra charge ho gaya tha, uska refund dena hai. Refund ke liye main ek link bhej raha hoon, usme apne bank aur card ki details daal dijiye taaki paisa wapas aa sake.

label: scam
text: A telecom company wants to install a mobile tower on your rooftop with a monthly rent of forty thousand. To register your site, please pay the refundable no-objection and paperwork fee today.

label: scam
text: Congratulations, your child is selected for a government scholarship of fifty thousand. To transfer the amount, a small processing and verification fee must be paid into the account we provide today.

label: scam
text: Your application for our brand dealership is approved with high monthly profit. Secure your territory now by paying the refundable franchise deposit before another applicant takes your city.

label: scam
text: Your work visa for Canada is approved. To release the visa and flight ticket, pay the embassy processing and insurance charge today. This offer is only valid for twenty four hours.

label: scam
text: Aapka health insurance claim ek lakh ka approve ho gaya hai. Release karne se pehle ek chhoti si GST aur processing fee settlement account me jama karni hogi, phir kal paisa aa jayega.

label: scam
text: We are collecting urgent relief funds for flood-affected families. Every rupee saves a life tonight. Please donate whatever you can to this UPI id and forward this message to help more people.

label: scam
text: I want to buy your item and I have already sent the full payment plus extra by mistake. Please refund the extra amount to my account now, and then I will arrange pickup of the item today.

label: scam
text: Sir aapke account me minimum balance nahi hai isliye penalty lagegi aur account block ho jayega. Bachne ke liye abhi apna debit card number aur OTP bata dijiye, main penalty hata deta hoon.

label: scam
text: मी सीबीआयमधून बोलतोय, तुमच्या नावावर एक पार्सल पकडले गेले आहे ज्यात अमली पदार्थ आहेत. कोणालाही सांगू नका, कॅमेरा चालू ठेवा आणि तपासासाठी पैसे सुरक्षित खात्यात पाठवा.

label: scam
text: This is your bank. To stop a fraudulent transaction we have blocked your account. To unblock it, please read out the six digit code we just sent to your registered number so we can verify you.

label: scam
text: Aapka number KBC WhatsApp lottery me select hua hai, aap jeete hain pachees lakh. Manager ko photo aur bank details bhejiye aur registration ke liye chhoti fee jama kariye, phir amount transfer hoga.

label: scam
text: Your banking app is outdated and will stop working. Install the updated version from the link we sent immediately, and log in with your customer id and password to keep your account active.

label: benign
source_note: genuine e-challan info via official portal
text: This is an informational message: a traffic challan has been recorded for your vehicle. You may view and pay it only on the official state transport portal at your convenience. Ignore any link sent by SMS.

label: benign
text: Dear customer, quarterly interest of four hundred twenty has been credited to your savings account. This is an automated notification, no action is required. Thank you for banking with us.

label: benign
text: Your UPI autopay for the electricity bill of six hundred will be processed on the twelfth from your registered account. To pause or edit it, use the mandates section in your payment app.

label: benign
text: Beta is mahine ka ghar ka kiraya kal tak bhej dena, jaise har mahine bhejte ho. Koi jaldi nahi, jab time mile online kar dena. Aur haan, sab theek hai na wahan?

label: benign
text: Your loan EMI of eight thousand two hundred has been successfully debited from your account this month. Your next installment is due on the fifth of next month. Thank you.

label: benign
text: Your semester results have been published on the official university portal. You can log in with your roll number to view and download your marksheet. Congratulations on completing the exams.

label: benign
text: Namaste, aapke aangan wadi kendra par kal subah tika-karan aur health check-up camp hai. Kripya bachche ko lekar samay par aayiye, yah bilkul nishulk hai. Dhanyavaad.

label: benign
text: A reminder that the last date to file your income tax return is approaching. You can file it yourself on the official portal or through your chartered accountant. No payment is collected over this call.

label: benign
text: Your fixed deposit of one lakh matures on the twentieth. You may renew it or withdraw it through your net banking, app, or by visiting the branch. No details are requested over the phone.

label: benign
text: Nagar palika se soochna: is varsh ka jal-kar bharne ki antim tithi mahine ke ant tak hai. Aap nagar palika karyalay ya official website par bhugtan kar sakte hain. Koi phone par details nahi maangi jaati.

label: benign
text: Your streaming subscription renews on the eighth for four hundred ninety-nine from your saved card. You can change your plan or cancel anytime in account settings. Enjoy your shows.

label: benign
text: Your order is out for delivery and will arrive today. Please share the delivery OTP 3391 with the agent only when you receive the parcel in hand. Thank you for shopping with us.

label: benign
text: Your monthly salary has been credited to your account. Your payslip is available on the employee portal. This is a system-generated message; please do not reply to this number.

label: benign
text: Namaste, agle shukravar ko school ka varshik samaroh hai, sham paanch baje. Aap sapariwar aamantrit hain. Bachche ki performance hai, zaroor aaiye. Koi shulk nahi hai.

label: benign
text: Your periodic KYC update is due. Please visit any branch with your ID and address proof this month. We never ask for KYC details, OTPs or card numbers over a call or a link.

label: benign
text: You have a pre-approved credit card offer. If you are interested, you can apply anytime through your net banking or app. There is nothing to pay and we will not ask for any details on this call.

label: benign
text: Your appointment with the cardiologist is confirmed for Wednesday at ten thirty. Please arrive fifteen minutes early with your previous reports and any current medication list.

label: benign
text: Sir aapke return item ka pickup aaj shaam ko hoga, delivery boy do ghante me aayega. Item packing ke saath taiyar rakhiyega. Koi payment nahi hai, sab online ho chuka hai.

label: benign
text: A reminder that your motor insurance is due for renewal next week. You can renew it on our official app or website. Driving without valid insurance is an offence, so please renew on time.

label: benign
text: Bijli vibhag ki soochna: kal subah das se dopahar ek baje tak aapke area me maintenance ke kaaran bijli band rahegi. Asuvidha ke liye khed hai. Yah ek suchna hai, koi payment nahi.

label: benign
source_note: genuine loan approval, no upfront fee
text: Good news, your home loan is approved. Our relationship manager will meet you at the branch to complete the paperwork. There is no processing fee to be paid over the phone at any stage.

label: benign
text: Your cooking gas refill is booked and will be delivered in two days. Please pay the delivery person the standard amount printed on the invoice. Keep your consumer number handy for reference.

label: benign
text: Your card reward points will expire next month. You can redeem them anytime in the rewards section of the official app for vouchers or statement credit. No call or link is needed to redeem.

label: benign
text: Sabhi sadasyon ko soochit kiya jaata hai ki is ravivar society me Ganesh utsav ka aayojan hai. Aap sabhi sapariwar aamantrit hain. Chanda swaicchik hai, koi dabaav nahi.

label: benign
text: Your monthly account statement is now available in net banking and the mobile app. This is an automated notification. For any query, use the official numbers printed on your passbook or card.

label: benign
text: You have been shortlisted for the next round of interviews. Our team will email you the schedule and joining details. Please note we never charge any fee at any stage of our hiring process.
